mapper.sql: id, group_id, title, type, create_time, update_time, status, last_message_id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM telegram_group WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.insert:
insert into telegram_group
id,
group_id,
title,
type,
create_time,
update_time,
status,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.update:
update telegram_group
group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
last_message_id = #{lastMessageId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update telegram_group set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
